value_chain_position: Sole US builder of nuclear-powered aircraft carriers and one of two nuclear submarine shipyards; sells large naval combatants under sole-source or duopoly DoD contracts with decades-long backlogs.
relative_comps: HII is the only builder of US nuclear carriers — an absolute government monopoly for the nation's most capital-intensive defense asset. However, it is textbook maturing: revenue CAGR of 5.4% (3y) and FCF margin of 8% reflect a cost-plus contract structure that limits upside. The defense_tech theme partially fits via the Mission Technologies (IT/C4ISR) segment (~20% of revenue), which is growing faster and carries higher margins than shipbuilding. But the dominant business — legacy platform shipbuilding — maps to the 'legacy prime' caution in the defense_tech notes. Theme fit is partial.
